substep.title: Read Tag Prefix
substep.action:
Read `references/tag-recipes/{primary_tag}.md`. Find the `## Branch prefix` section. Extract the prefix value (everything before the slash in the single-plan format).
Tag → prefix mapping (canonical, in case the section is missing): - feature → feat - bug → fix - exploration → spike - hotfix → hotfix - infrastructure → infra - chore → chore
Store as {{tag_prefix}}.

substep.title: Compose Branch Name
substep.action:
Apply the branch-name formula:
- plan_count == 1 → `{tag_prefix}/{ticket_slug}` - plan_count > 1 AND parallel_safe → `{tag_prefix}/{ticket_slug}-plan-{plan_index}` - plan_count > 1 AND NOT parallel_safe → `{tag_prefix}/{ticket_slug}` (single worktree; plans serialize within)
Store as {{branch}}.

check.action: Branch already exists. Halt with: "Branch {{branch}} already exists. Inspect with `wt list` or `git branch`. If this is a resumption, dispatch to the existing worktree path instead of creating a new one. If it is stale, remove via `wt remove {{branch}}` first."
